code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut has_digit = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
      in_num = true
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = 0 - 1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
    else
      if has_digit
        sum = sum + sign * cur
        count = count + 1
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
      has_digit = false
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit
  sum = sum + sign * cur
  count = count + 1
end

let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
